name: skylence
description: Wires the Skylence toolchain into Claude Code: /lsp install <language>, the judge-design skill chain + judge-setup, 6 bundled MCP servers, 13 LSP servers, a judge PreToolUse hook (inert until ~/.claude/judge-rules.json exists), and a SessionStart skyline-tools steer. Everything dormant until its binary, endpoint, or opt-in file is present.
